input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.7.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.7.1
            TITLE: fuel lines must be securely attached to the vehicle and/or engine.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.7.1: Fuel lines must be securely attached to the vehicle and/or engine.
IC.5.7.1 Fuel lines must be securely attached to the vehicle and/or engine.

final_answer: Fuel lines must be securely attached to the vehicle and/or engine.
